posts.author: lgault (Lindsey Gault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to expand all SUBITEMS in a board at once.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to expand all SUBITEMS in a board at once without having to click into each group and then click “expand all subitems”. The current shortcut only supports expanding/collapsing groups and does not affect subitems unless those subitems were already manually expanded. It would also be extremely useful to be able to keep SUBITEMS expanded in the default view.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES, expanding all subitems at once would be incredibly helpful.

Once you start using subitems heavily, having to expand them group by group gets tedious pretty quickly. A simple “expand all subitems” option at the board level would make reviewing work or auditing boards much easier.

I’m not sure I’d personally want them expanded by default every time the board loads, though. On larger boards that could get overwhelming pretty quickly and make scrolling harder.

What might work well is:

  • an “Expand all subitems” toggle or shortcut

  • maybe even a view-level setting so you can choose whether subitems are expanded or collapsed depending on the view

That way people who want the full hierarchy visible can get it quickly, but boards stay manageable by default.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lgault
The only option is, you can expand subitems for each group. You will have to expand for each group seperately.
